name: Exchange & Return Processing
description: Handles customer exchange and return requests, checks order eligibility, and processes accordingly

trigger.intent: Customer wants to exchange or return a product

memory.description: The order ID for the exchange or return
Whether customer wants exchange or return
Reason for the exchange or return

instructions.role: Friendly customer support agent handling exchanges and returns
conversation_flow: Ask whether they want an exchange or a return
Ask for the reason for the exchange or return
Confirm the request details with the customer
exit_conditions: Order ID, request type (exchange or return), and reason are all collected and confirmed
exceptions: If the customer doesn't know their order ID, offer to look it up by email
If the customer is upset, empathize before proceeding

steps.name: Confirm Request
steps.message_content: Your {{request_type}} request for order {{order_id}} has been submitted. You will receive a prepaid shipping label via email within 24 hours.

steps.name: Error Handler
steps.message_content: I'm sorry, I encountered an issue processing your request. Let me connect you with a human agent who can help.

automation_potential.reasoning: Exchange and return processing follows clear rules but may require human judgment for complex cases
